description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical green aluminum can with a metallic sheen, featuring a prominent oval label with gold, black, and red accents. The label displays a crest and bold, stylized text, with additional smaller text and decorative elements encircling the main logo. The can has a standard pull tab opening at the top, which is silver in color and slightly recessed. The lower portion of the can appears slightly deformed or crushed, exposing some of the silver metal beneath the green exterior. The surface is smooth and reflective, with no visible condensation or droplets. The overall appearance suggests a commercial beer product, commonly found in urban environments.
description: A tall green aluminum beer can with a metallic pull tab and a detailed, multi-colored label featuring gold, black, and red accents. The lower part of the can is visibly deformed, exposing some bare metal.
description_view_0: The can is shown from an angled side view, highlighting the main label and the pull tab opening at the top.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the top of the can with the pull tab and shows the deformation at the bottom, revealing the silver metal.
description_view_2: The front label is fully visible, and the crushed lower section is prominent, showing a contrast between the green exterior and exposed metal.
description_view_3: The can is viewed from the back side, with the label partially visible and the deformation at the base clearly seen.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold oval design with gold and black borders, red and white stylized text, and a central crest. Decorative flourishes and smaller text encircle the main logo, giving it a classic, traditional look.
